notes: Model availability is checked on the remote Ollama endpoint at runtime.
Add new installed models here with the profiles they can realistically run on.
30B-class models are restricted to the dual profile unless hardware capacity changes.

qwen3-coder:30b-a3b-q4_K_M.use: 30B coding model candidate across both GPUs

qwen3-coder:30b.use: larger coding model across both GPUs

qwen3:14b.use: single 12GB GPU general reasoning and structured output

qwen2.5-coder:14b.use: single 12GB GPU coding and test generation

qwen2.5-coder:7b.use: single 12GB GPU background tool-use or smaller coding tests
